MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) PTR-11-294889 WITH CASE CGC-11-513313
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
J. Michael Phelps, Esq., of Law Offices of Michael Phelps, Tel. 415.433.3733, appearing for Plaintiff.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ADRIENNE BROWN-EDINGTON and CHARLES EDINGTON'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) PTR-11-294889 WITH CASE CGC-11-513313 is Granted in part. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes with PTR-11-294889 being the lead case and henceforth all papers filed only under that case number. All matters in both cases will be heard in the probate division. The February 29 hearing in the probate division is confirmed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
